summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Rilievo Misure module - backend APIs working well (88.2% success), frontend pages load correctly with tablet-friendly design, navigation flows successful

minor_issues.issue: PDF generation had initial bug with table structure
minor_issues.fix_description: Fixed empty cell handling in photo table generation - replaced string values with proper Paragraph objects

ui_bugs.issue: Initial page load sometimes shows blank screen briefly before form renders
ui_bugs.workaround: Wait 3-5 seconds for React components to mount properly

integration_issues.issue: DOM element becomes detached during navigation, causing click failures
integration_issues.impact: Minor - affects only existing rilievo opening from table

passed_tests: ✅ Rilievo filtering by client and status working
✅ Rilievi list page loads with correct table
✅ 'Nuovo Rilievo' button on rilievi page working
✅ 'Nuovo Rilievo' button on clients page working
✅ Navigation from clients to rilievo editor with client_id working
✅ Rilievo editor form fields interactive and working
✅ Tablet-first design with large buttons and tabs visible
✅ Info, Schizzi, and Foto tabs present and accessible
✅ Form validation working (client and project name required)
action_item_for_main_agent: Minor frontend timing issue with React component mounting - consider adding loading states. PDF generation bug has been fixed. Overall module is working well with tablet-friendly design.
